taxonomy: Pleconax macrodonta is a species of freshwater snail that belongs to the family Diplommatinidae. This classification places it within the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and order Pulmonata. Further categorization includes family Diplommatinidae, genus Pleconax, and species P. macrodonta. It is primarily found in Southeast Asia, particularly in the Philippines and Indonesia. The exact classification of P. macrodonta may be subject to change as taxonomic research continues.
